sections.paragraph:
Original: אגדּה

Transliteration: 'ăgûddâh

Phonetic: ag-ood-daw'

BDB Definition:

  1. band, binding
    1. cords, bands, thongs (metaphorical of slavery)
    2. bunch of hyssop
    3. band of men, troops
    4. vault (of the heavens), firmament (binding earth to the heavens)

Origin: f passive participle of an unused root (meaning to bind)

TWOT entry: 15a

Part(s) of speech: Noun Feminine
